codes.title: Giant Simulator Reborn Codes
codes.subtitle: Redeem active Giant Simulator Reborn codes for free Gold, then spend it on stronger gear, weapons, loot crates, and early progression.
codes.intro: Giant Simulator Reborn codes give players a fast Gold boost before the normal training loop begins. Use the largest Gold rewards first, then enter each code through the white bird button inside the Roblox experience.

items.note: Best first redeem because it gives the largest listed Gold reward.
Useful for early gear, loot crates, and pet-focused progression.
A strong starter code for faster early upgrades.
Good mid-sized Gold reward for building your first upgrade fund.
Adds extra Gold for early spending decisions.
Useful when stacking all starter rewards before farming.
A tiny bonus code, mainly worth redeeming while clearing the full list.

items.title: Total Active Code Value
items.note: Redeeming every active Gold code gives a large early boost before training, gear upgrades, and pet hatching.

items.title: Launch the Roblox experience
items.text: Open Giant Simulator: REBORN from its Roblox game page.

items.title: Press the white bird button
items.text: Use the bird icon on the right side of the screen to open the code box.

items.title: Enter the code
items.text: Paste one code into the text box exactly as written.

items.title: Press Enter
items.text: Submit the code to claim the Gold reward.

beginnerGuide.title: Giant Simulator Reborn Beginner Guide
beginnerGuide.subtitle: Learn the basic loop: click for XP, grow larger, unlock better gear, hatch pets, fight rivals, and prepare for rebirth.
beginnerGuide.intro: Giant Simulator Reborn is built around simple repeated growth. Your first goal is to turn clicks into XP, XP into size, Gold into upgrades, pets into faster progress, and rebirth into stronger long-term scaling.

items.title: Click to gain XP
items.action: Click to earn XP and increase your giant size.
items.result: Your character becomes bigger and starts moving through the core progression loop.

items.title: Redeem starter codes
items.goal: Collect free Gold before spending time farming.
items.action: Use the active codes list and claim the highest Gold rewards first.
items.result: You can begin with a stronger upgrade budget instead of grinding from zero.

items.title: Upgrade weapons and armor
items.goal: Improve XP gain, damage, and combat strength.
items.action: Spend Gold on better gear and equipment as soon as upgrades become meaningful.
items.result: Your clicks, combat performance, and growth speed improve together.

items.title: Open loot crates
items.action: Use Gold to open loot crates for weapons, skins, and companion-style boosts.
items.result: Better loot gives stronger multipliers and makes future farming smoother.

items.title: Hatch and upgrade pets
items.goal: Add pet growth to your main progression loop.
items.action: Hatch pets, collect better companions, and keep upgrading the pets you use.
items.result: Pets grow with you and support faster long-term progress.

items.title: Fight rivals
items.goal: Test your size, gear, and pet setup.
items.action: Use combat as a checkpoint after upgrading your weapons, armor, and pets.
items.result: You learn whether your build is ready for stronger players and harder goals.

items.title: Prepare for rebirth
items.goal: Move from short-term growth into long-term power.
items.action: Rebirth after you understand your current gear, pet value, and upgrade route.
items.result: Rebirth helps you come back stronger and keep climbing the server leaderboard.

levelingAndGoldFarming.title: Giant Simulator Reborn Leveling and Gold Farming Guide
levelingAndGoldFarming.subtitle: Use codes, training, gear, pets, and combat checks to level faster and spend Gold with a clear priority.
levelingAndGoldFarming.intro: Fast progression in Giant Simulator Reborn comes from stacking the basic systems correctly. Claim Gold codes first, train for XP, invest in weapons and armor, hatch useful pets, and use combat or rebirth goals to decide when your setup needs another upgrade.

items.title: Claim Gold Before Farming
items.data: Active codes can provide up to 50,001 Gold.
items.action: Redeem Demonking, Pets, Gianttofuu, Razorfishpets, Azadpets, Planetmilopets, and Freegold before your first long farming session.
items.why_it_matters: Free Gold shortens the weakest early-game phase and lets you buy upgrades sooner.

items.title: Train for XP
items.data: The Roblox game page states that clicking gives XP and makes your giant grow larger.
items.action: Keep training while checking whether your next upgrade gives better growth value.
items.why_it_matters: XP is the base of size progression, and size is the center of the simulator loop.

items.title: Spend Gold on Gear
items.data: Gold is used for stronger gear, weapons, loot crates, and equipment progression.
items.action: Buy gear upgrades when they improve XP gain, combat damage, or overall farming speed.
items.why_it_matters: Better weapons and armor make each training and combat cycle more efficient.

items.title: Use Loot Crates Carefully
items.data: Loot crates can unlock weapons, skins, and companion-style boosts.
items.action: Open crates after claiming free Gold, then compare whether the reward improves your current growth route.
items.why_it_matters: Spending randomly burns Gold; spending around clear upgrades keeps progression cleaner.

items.title: Hatch Pets for Growth Support
items.data: The Roblox page highlights hatching, collecting, and upgrading pets that grow with the player.
items.action: Add pets after your basic gear path is moving, then keep upgrading the pets you actually use.
items.why_it_matters: Pets support long-term growth instead of giving only one-time power.

items.title: Use Combat as a Progress Check
items.data: The game loop includes fighting rivals and ruling the server.
items.action: After upgrades, test your strength through combat before deciding whether to farm more Gold or push toward rebirth.
items.why_it_matters: Combat shows whether your XP, gear, and pet setup are keeping pace.

items.title: Farm Event Currency When Events Are Active
items.data: Community video coverage highlights Shell farming and Summer Event progression.
items.action: Use event routes when they directly support pets, artifacts, or upgrade goals.
items.why_it_matters: Event resources can be valuable when they feed your actual progression path.

items.title: Play Manually and Avoid Scripts
items.data: This guide only covers normal in-game progression.
items.action: Do not use exploit scripts, automation tools, or third-party cheat menus.
items.why_it_matters: Manual progression keeps your Roblox account safe and your growth steady.

petsGuide.title: Giant Simulator Reborn Pets Guide
petsGuide.subtitle: Pets are part of the main growth loop: hatch them, collect stronger options, upgrade them, and use event pets when available.
petsGuide.intro: Pets in Giant Simulator Reborn are not just decoration. The Roblox page highlights hatching, collecting, and upgrading pets that grow with the player, making them a core part of long-term progression alongside gear, weapons, combat, and rebirth.

items.title: Hatch Pets
items.what_it_does: Adds companions to your progression setup.
items.player_action: Use the pet system after building an early Gold and gear base.
items.best_for: Beginners who want growth support beyond clicking and gear alone.

items.title: Collect Better Pets
items.what_it_does: Builds a stronger pet roster over time.
items.player_action: Keep replacing weak early pets when a stronger option improves your current route.
items.best_for: Players moving from starter growth into longer farming sessions.

items.title: Upgrade Active Pets
items.what_it_does: Keeps pet value aligned with your growing giant.
items.player_action: Prioritize upgrades for pets you actually use instead of spreading resources across everything.
items.best_for: Players who want cleaner long-term scaling.

items.title: Use Gold Codes Before Pet Spending
items.what_it_does: Gives an early Gold pool before committing to pet and gear decisions.
items.player_action: Redeem the active Gold codes before making your first major pet-related spend.
items.best_for: New players trying to avoid slow early farming.

items.title: Watch Event Pets
items.what_it_does: Event pets can become short-term progression goals during updates.
items.player_action: Check active events and update showcases before spending heavily outside the event route.
items.best_for: Players farming limited-time content such as Summer Event pets.

items.title: Pair Pets With Gear
items.what_it_does: Pets work best when they support the same growth plan as weapons, armor, and rebirth goals.
items.player_action: Upgrade gear and pets together instead of treating pets as a separate side system.
items.best_for: Players preparing for stronger combat checks and future rebirths.

items.title: Use Pets for Rebirth Preparation
items.what_it_does: A stronger pet setup helps smooth the path toward the next reset cycle.
items.player_action: Improve your pets before pushing into a rebirth-focused session.
items.best_for: Players who want faster recovery and stronger long-term growth after rebirth.

rebirthAndSoulGems.title: Giant Simulator Reborn Rebirth and Soul Gems Guide
rebirthAndSoulGems.subtitle: Learn when to rebirth, what Soul Gems do, and how to recover quickly after each reset for permanent gains instead of wasting a reset on a weak loop.
rebirthAndSoulGems.intro: Rebirth is the main long-term progression system in Giant Simulator Reborn. It resets your current run, grants Soul Gems, improves your future growth, and turns each new cycle into a faster climb toward stronger gear, better pets, and boss farming.

items.title: Reach the Rebirth requirement
items.summary: Train, level up, equip stronger weapons and armor, and push until the Rebirth button becomes active.
details: Use the Rebirth tab from the left-side menu when your run is ready.
The classic Rebirth requirement is Level 100.
Rebirth should happen after your current run has slowed down and the next reset will make the following climb faster.

items.title: Confirm the reset for Soul Gems
items.summary: Rebirthing resets your current level progress and pays Soul Gems as the permanent reward.
details: Soul Gems are tied to rebirth progression and long-term skill growth.
Higher progression before rebirth can improve the value of the reset.
After rebirth, immediately rebuild your basic training loop instead of staying idle at low power.

items.title: Spend Soul Gems on permanent skills
items.summary: Use Soul Gems for upgrades that improve future runs instead of only chasing short-term size.
details: Coin multiplier helps your Gold economy recover faster.
EXP gain speeds up leveling after each reset.
Double Weapons / Ambidextrous is a high-value upgrade because it improves weapon-based training output.
Crit chance supports combat and boss damage.
Speed gain makes movement, training routes, and farming loops smoother.

items.title: Farm extra Soul Gems after rebirth
items.summary: Rebirth is the main Soul Gem source, but boss and Temple routes also matter once your character is strong enough.
details: Demon King farming is a key Soul Gem route after players can handle the Temple area.
Soul training in the Temple area gives a passive Soul Gem path.
Boss progression becomes more valuable after several rebirths because boss damage improves with long-term power.

items.title: Recover with a clean post-rebirth loop
items.summary: The first minutes after rebirth decide whether the reset was useful or wasted on a slow restart.
details: Claim current Gold codes before buying early upgrades.
Equip the best weapon and armor you can immediately afford.
Hatch or equip the strongest available pets for your current goal.
Return to quests and bosses once your damage is high enough for fast clears.
Repeat the cycle when leveling slows again and the next Soul Gem payout is worth the reset.

weaponsGearAndPetsTierList.title: Giant Simulator Reborn Weapons Gear and Pets Tier List
weaponsGearAndPetsTierList.subtitle: Use this tier list as a progression priority map: early gear gets you moving, pets multiply the loop, artifacts support permanent scaling, and event rewards can jump you ahead.
weaponsGearAndPetsTierList.intro: Giant Simulator Reborn is built around clicking for XP, growing larger, unlocking better gear, equipping weapons and armor, hatching pets, upgrading pets, and rebirthing for stronger future runs. The best item is usually the one that improves your next loop fastest, not the one with the flashiest rarity label.

targets: Best weapon you can currently equip
Best armor set you can currently equip
Current Temple or late-game gear when unlocked
items.best_for: XP gain, combat power, faster leveling, boss readiness
items.priority_notes: Always keep your active weapon and armor updated when a new level or Gold milestone unlocks a clear stat increase.

items.category: Event evolved pets and event artifacts
items.best_for: Fast catch-up, limited-time progression, stronger reset recovery
items.priority_notes: During active events, limited pets and artifacts can become the fastest way to push growth because they sit outside the normal shop ladder.

items.category: Soul Gem and Quest Point scaling
items.priority_notes: Soul Gem and Quest Point scaling matters most once you are already rebirthing and completing quests consistently.

targets: Upgraded pets that grow with you
items.best_for: Training speed, Gold flow, XP growth, event farming
items.priority_notes: A full active pet team is usually better than holding unused pets in inventory, because equipped pets directly support the main growth loop.

items.category: Starter shop gear and first pets
items.best_for: First session progress, early leveling, first Rebirth setup
items.priority_notes: Starter gear is valuable only while it speeds up the next unlock. Replace it quickly when better gear becomes available.

items.category: Old gear, weak duplicates, and inactive pets
targets: Cosmetic-only setups with no progression value
items.priority_notes: Do not let old items decide your active build. Keep the strongest progression setup equipped, because nostalgia does not farm Gold.

bossesQuestsAndPvpGuide.title: Giant Simulator Reborn Bosses Quests and PvP Guide
bossesQuestsAndPvpGuide.subtitle: Use combat, quests, and boss routes to turn training into real progress. Grow, gear up, and hold your ground against stronger players on the leaderboard.
bossesQuestsAndPvpGuide.intro: Combat in Giant Simulator Reborn connects directly to the main simulator loop. You click to gain XP, grow larger, unlock better gear, equip weapons and armor, hatch pets, complete quests, fight bosses, and rebirth when the reset gives better long-term power.

items.title: Core combat loop
items.content: Train for XP, level up, unlock stronger gear, equip weapons and armor, hatch and upgrade pets, then use that power to clear quests and bosses faster.
tips: Upgrade gear when the next purchase gives faster XP or boss clears.
Keep pets equipped instead of treating them like inventory decorations.
Use rebirth skills to improve Gold, EXP, crit, speed, and weapon output across future runs.

items.title: Boss priority
items.content: Borock is the early boss target, while Demon King becomes important once you can handle the Temple route and want Soul Gem-focused progression.
tips: Use early boss fights to test whether your damage is ready for quests.
Move to Demon King farming when your weapon, armor, pets, and rebirth skills make clears efficient.
Boss damage becomes more meaningful after repeated rebirth cycles.

items.title: Quest routing
items.content: Quest tasks include defeating Gnomes, collecting Orbs, defeating Borock, defeating Demon King, collecting Golden Eggs, and mining meteors. Quest rewards include Gold, Experience, and Quest Points.
tips: Take quests that match what you are already farming.
Prioritize fast boss or collection tasks when you need Quest Points for artifact progress.
Do not abandon the main upgrade loop just to chase a slow quest with poor timing.

items.title: PvP survival
items.content: PvP is easier after your level, gear, pets, speed, and rebirth upgrades can support real movement and damage. New players should avoid fighting high-power giants until their build can recover quickly.
tips: Train and upgrade before picking fights with visibly stronger players.
Use quieter servers when you want safer farming or event collection.
Spend Gold on useful upgrades before entering risky combat areas.

items.title: When to change gear or farming target
items.content: Change weapons, armor, pets, or farming routes when your current setup no longer improves leveling speed, Gold gain, quest clears, or boss farming.
tips: If leveling slows, upgrade weapon and armor first.
If Gold slows, improve pets, coin skills, and Gold routes.
If boss clears are slow, delay the boss route until your damage and crit setup improves.
If a new event is active, check event pets, artifacts, and event currency before grinding normal routes.

eventsUpdatesAndOfficialLinks.title: Giant Simulator Reborn Events Updates and Official Links
eventsUpdatesAndOfficialLinks.subtitle: Use these links to track new updates, event rewards, codes, server activity, and community announcements without relying on copied posts and stale code lists.
eventsUpdatesAndOfficialLinks.intro: Giant Simulator Reborn updates are best tracked through the Roblox game page, Mithril Games community pages, the official Discord invite, and the Mithril Games X account. Event-focused players should also watch current gameplay showcases for limited pets, artifacts, event currency, and Summer Shell routes.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Giant Simulator Reborn

questions.question: What is Giant Simulator Reborn?
questions.answer: Giant Simulator Reborn is a Roblox giant growth simulator where you click to gain XP, grow larger, unlock weapons and armor, hatch pets, rebirth for permanent scaling, and climb the leaderboards.

questions.question: How do I redeem codes in Giant Simulator Reborn?
questions.answer: Open Giant Simulator Reborn on Roblox, press the white bird button on the right side of the screen, paste a code into the text box, and press Enter to claim your Gold reward.

questions.question: What are pets used for in Giant Simulator Reborn?
questions.answer: In Giant Simulator Reborn, pets add a permanent growth multiplier to your training, Gold gain, and combat power, so hatching, collecting, and upgrading them is a core part of long-term progression.

questions.question: When should I rebirth in Giant Simulator Reborn?
questions.answer: Rebirth in Giant Simulator Reborn once your current run slows down and the next reset will make the following climb faster, because rebirth grants Soul Gems that improve Gold, XP, crit, speed, and weapon output across future runs.

questions.question: Is Giant Simulator Reborn free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. Giant Simulator Reborn is free to play on Roblox. You can launch it directly from the official Roblox game page and start growing your giant right away.

questions.question: Where can I get new Giant Simulator Reborn codes?
questions.answer: New Giant Simulator Reborn codes are shared through the official Mithril Games Discord, the Mithril Games X account, and Roblox community updates, so following those channels keeps your code list current.
